delivery: ONE word-anchored hyperlink in an HTML body, plus a plain-text fallback. The study page (demo embedded inside it) is the only link.
subject: A little research we did on Big Dan's
html_body:
[Talon before you send, set the sender to docket@alaskaaihq.com, then delete this line]

Hi Dan and Sarah,

We spent this week getting to know Big Dan's and kept landing on one thing. Every booking your online calendar can't answer ends up on Sarah's phone, across three ports and four boats. It made us curious enough to just do the work, so we put together a short read on what we found and the one idea we'd try first. It's free and it's the write-up, honest about the parts that are hard too. If it's useful just reply and I'll send you more.

Talon, Alaska AI
(built by our agent team, checked by a human before it reached you)
